user.name: God of Prompt
user.description:
Human + AI = Superpowers 

🔑 Sharing AI Prompts, Systems, Tips & Tricks

tweets.text:
"Why does my AI output sound so generic?"

Because you're prompting at the surface.

You ask for a strategy, AI gives you one, you move on. You never ask "and then what happens?"

That one missing question separates average AI work from exceptional. And it has a name. https://t.co/h1IY06quEO
tweets.name: God of Prompt

tweets.text:
Some people calling this a declaration of war on AI.

It's not. I read it.

Pope Leo XIV just released "Magnifica Humanitas." 42,300 words. His first encyclical. The most authoritative document a pope can issue. Entirely focused on AI.

He signed it on the 135th anniversary of https://t.co/j0XUMl3mvZ
tweets.name: God of Prompt

tweets.text:
🚨 THIS WORKS: You can use Claude to filter out freelancers who are faking their prompting skills.

Open a shared screen. Give them a fresh Claude session. Run these 7 challenges live, like a coding interview but for prompting.

Nothing rehearsed. Just them, Claude, and 30 https://t.co/F06Iwnd293
tweets.name: God of Prompt

tweets.text:
TRAE just killed the “which agent should I use?” problem.

SOLO Builder and SOLO Coder are now merged into one unified SOLO Agent.

One agent for frontend apps, complex programming tasks, routine dev work, MCPs, tools, and shipping.

@Trae_ai https://t.co/zU7JNgicDU
tweets.name: God of Prompt

tweets.text:
Agents don’t need another shiny demo.

They need memory for the boring production flows that actually matter.

Rote turns successful API runs into replayable local flows, so agents stop burning tokens to rediscover what already worked.

That’s the missing infra layer.

@modiqoai https://t.co/WWmEgi3V0z

And one model family was consistently exploiting the flaw. 👇 https://t.co/IDSK9sT8fc
tweets.name: God of Prompt

tweets.text:
Perplexity just open-sourced their internal security scanner. It's called Bumblebee.

It scans your machine for compromised packages, malicious browser extensions, infected editor extensions (VS Code, Cursor, Windsurf), and MCP server configs.

Read-only. Doesn't execute https://t.co/o3Np6LPhDF
tweets.name: God of Prompt

tweets.text:
The prompt box was never enough.

AI video needs a creative workflow, not another “type and pray” casino.

Topview Canvas lets you build the storyboard first, arrange scenes on an infinite Figma-like canvas, work with an agent, then generate with Seedance 2.0.

Control before https://t.co/Q2Qu1D4Zzb https://t.co/nDA3Zhiv8F
tweets.name: God of Prompt

tweets.text:
Voice agents finally got out of the waveform era.

Your agent can already talk.
Now it can look back, react, and feel present without rebuilding your stack.

LiveAvatar plugging into LiveKit, Pipecat, Agora, and VisionAgent is a big unlock for real conversational UX. https://t.co/apZ4aYU4D8
